text: Being here, I am caught between observation and participation. The glass wall in the first image creates a sense of separation—inside, minds are focused, an exchange of ideas taking place. I feel curious, but also somewhat isolated, as if witnessing knowledge being shared without being able to contribute. In the second image, the vibrant wall of 'R+D' (Research and Development) engages me visually and intellectually. I am drawn to the curious interplay between humanity and technology on display, reminding me that learning is both a solitary and collective endeavor. Overall, I feel thoughtful, reflective, and eager to connect the dots between isolation and innovation.
